Humor Live Workshop Replay
Thank you all for participating in Sunday’s humor workshop. I hope everyone who
attended learned some new strategies, found new ways to infuse your life with humor,
and found the day entertaining, too.
You certainly had me laughing!
You can now start using the strategies I taught you in a variety of situations - both
professional and personal. In your writing and in your speaking. Formally and
informally.
You can access my slides from the day as well as the replay recording below.
Slides
At the end of my slide deck, you’ll find links to all of the stories I referenced throughout
the day, as well as some of the scenes from movies and SNL skits that you might want
to watch, dissect, and deconstruct.
Recording
In addition, as part of your purchase, you have received a 20% off Storyworthy
Coupon . Please feel free to use it on a different product.
This coupon ( ) can be used on one of the new courses that I	PROMO CODE: WORKSHOP20
introduced yesterday.
My goal is to help you tell better stories to improve your personal and professional life.
The more you hone your craft, the better your stories become, and the more you will
find that people want to hear what you say.I can’t wait to help you on your storytelling
journey!
Warmly,
Matt
